title: RSSB – Senior Computer Instructor & Basic Computer Instructor – 3951 Posts
shortInfo: The RSSB has released 3951 Senior and Basic Computer Instructor vacancies. Eligible candidates with BCA, B.Tech/B.E, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, MCA can apply online on or before June 23, 2026, at rssb.rajasthan.gov.in

basic_details.job_title: Rajasthan RSSB Senior and Basic Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026 - 3951 Posts | Apply Online 25 May to 23 June
basic_details.short_information: The RSSB has released 3951 Senior and Basic Computer Instructor vacancies. Eligible candidates with BCA, B.Tech/B.E, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, MCA can apply online on or before June 23, 2026, at rssb.rajasthan.gov.in

qualification.education_qualification: Degree mark sheets & certificates (ME/M.Tech/MCA/M.Sc for Senior; Graduate+PGDCA/BCA/B.Tech for Basic)

selection_process: CBT (200 marks) + Document Verification + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Rajasthan SSO Portal (sso.rajasthan.gov.in). No offline applications are accepted under any circumstances. The online portal is active from 25-05-2026 to 23-06-2026 (11:59 PM).
seo_tags: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board Senior Computer Instructor & Basic Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026
